subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: This Verification Method is applicable to components with a resistance coefficient of variation of at least 10% and not more than 40%.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Where a component has a calculated resistance coefficient of variation of less than 10%, then a minimum value of 10% must be used.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Compliance with B1P1 and B1P2 is verified for the design of a structural component for strength where—

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The resistance model for the component must be established by taking into account variability due to material properties, fabrication and construction processes and structural modelling.
